notes: Expanded coverage to gateway, context, indexing, OpenAI response parsing, planner fallback/remote behavior, and Qdrant helper flows.
Fixed planner schema drift so mcp_server evidence is accepted in structured planner artifacts.
HAM remains a conceptual reference only; universal orchestrator behavior stays client-agnostic.
outcome: Context-orchestrator now has broad unit/protocol coverage over its main long-term reliability risks.
